headline: Sunrate and Mastercard Release White Paper on Agentic AI and the Future of B2B Global Payments
summary: Sunrate, the global payment and treasury management platform, and Mastercard, a global technology company in the payments industry, unveiled a joint white paper, Beyond Automation: Defining Agentic Global Payments, at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC).

content.title: Sunrate and Mastercard Release White Paper on Agentic AI and the Future of B2B Global Payments
content.summary: Sunrate, the global payment and treasury management platform, and Mastercard, a global technology company in the payments industry, unveiled a joint white paper, Beyond Automation: Defining Agentic Global Payments, at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC).
